about.title: About Me
about.who_am_i_desc: I'm a software developer who fell deeply in love with programming and the ability to build solutions from scratch. I thrive on big challenges — those complex problems that make others hesitate are exactly what drive me to dig deeper. I live in constant learning mode, consuming information daily to stay on top of emerging technologies.
about.where_desc: Based in Córdoba, Argentina, currently finishing my last year of a Software Programming degree — giving me a solid, up-to-date theoretical and practical foundation. I work remotely on a global scale, connecting with international teams and clients to deliver value across borders.
about.what_i_do_desc: I turn ideas into living code. I specialize in Full Stack development — designing robust backend architectures and connecting them to beautiful, intuitive, fluid user interfaces. I enjoy bridging the gap between the hard logic of the server and the final experience of the user.
about.my_idea_desc: Transform and optimize businesses. I help clients automate every possible process to maximize efficiency, providing close, empathetic, and strategic guidance. I stand out for my ability to deeply understand each client's real needs and translate them into effective technical solutions with direct impact on their productivity.
